---
title: "Welcome!"
toc: false
---

---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: block1
  links:
   #- text: "Other templates"
    # href: https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
   - icon: linkedin
     href: https://ch.linkedin.com/in/sabina-pedrazzini-543051169
   - icon: envelope
     href: "mailto:sabina.pedrazzini@unibe.ch"
---

::: {#block1}
:::

<!-- note: to create the block above (which "calls" the yaml block): 1) go on "Source" mode 2) :::{#bock1}:::-->

## Welcome on my website :)

text 1

### heading 3

ffjfjf
